operationOptions.description: Administration: Custom Fields | Create a new custom field.

operationOptions.description: Stations: Podcasts | Create a new podcast episode.

operationOptions.description: Stations: Media | Upload a new file.

operationOptions.description: Administration: Users | Create a new login token.

operationOptions.name: addMount | POST /station/{station_id}/mounts
operationOptions.description: Stations: Mount Points | Create a new mount point.

operationOptions.name: addMyApiKey | POST /frontend/account/api-keys
operationOptions.description: My Account | Create a new API key associated with your account.

operationOptions.name: addPlaylist | POST /station/{station_id}/playlists
operationOptions.description: Stations: Playlists | Create a new playlist.

operationOptions.name: addPodcast | POST /station/{station_id}/podcasts
operationOptions.description: Stations: Podcasts | Create a new podcast.

operationOptions.name: addRelay | POST /station/{station_id}/remotes
operationOptions.description: Stations: Remote Relays | Create a new remote relay.

operationOptions.name: addRole | POST /admin/roles
operationOptions.description: Administration: Roles | Create a new role.

operationOptions.name: addSftpUser | POST /station/{station_id}/sftp-users
operationOptions.description: Stations: SFTP Users | Create a new SFTP user.

operationOptions.name: addStorageLocation | POST /admin/storage_locations
operationOptions.description: Administration: Storage Locations | Create a new storage location.

operationOptions.name: addStreamer | POST /station/{station_id}/streamers
operationOptions.description: Stations: Streamers/DJs | Create a new Streamer/DJ account.

operationOptions.name: addUser | POST /admin/users
operationOptions.description: Administration: Users | Create a new user.

operationOptions.name: addWebhook | POST /station/{station_id}/webhooks
operationOptions.description: Stations: Web Hooks | Create a new web hook.

operationOptions.name: adminAcmeViewLog | GET /admin/acme-log/{path}
operationOptions.description: Administration: General | View the logs of a manually run ACME certificate renewal.

operationOptions.name: adminAddStation | POST /admin/stations
operationOptions.description: Administration: Stations | Create a new station.

operationOptions.name: adminBackupsViewLog | GET /admin/backups/log/{path}
operationOptions.description: Administration: Backups | View a specific backup log contents.
